import pandas as pd


def normalize_prices(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    result = df.copy()
    result["price"] = df["price"] / df["price"].max()
    return result


def add_full_name(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.Series:
    return df["first_name"] + " " + df["last_name"]


def filter_and_label(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    premium_mask = df["total_spent"] > 1000
    subset = df.loc[premium_mask].copy()
    subset["discount"] = subset["total_spent"] * 0.1
    return subset
